synergies.name: Penitent's Edge
synergies.description: The Grey Cleaver awakens to its true nature through spirit infusion.

synergies.name: Stormforge Hammer
synergies.description: Storm energy overcharges the Architect's design, devastating constructs.

synergies.name: Rootbound Lance
synergies.bonus_effect: 20% chance to inflict Slow on physical hit
synergies.description: Earth energy channels through the spear, entangling targets with root growth.

synergies.name: Resonance Staff
synergies.description: Ley energy harmonizes with the staff's arcane conductivity.

synergies.name: Shadowfang
synergies.bonus_effect: Steal rate +25%, successful steals 15% Despair chance
synergies.description: Void energy coats the dagger's edge, slicing through material and morale.

synergies.name: Crucible Maul
synergies.description: Flame energy superheats the hammer, halving device forging costs.

synergies.name: Oathkeeper
synergies.bonus_effect: +15% damage when any ally has Faint status
synergies.description: Spirit energy responds to Edren's protective instincts when allies fall.
